name: chronos-cms
description: A self-hostable, open-source headless CMS for developers

scripts.setup: prisma generate --schema=packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run build --workspace=packages/db && prisma migrate dev --schema=packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma && node packages/db/dist/seed.js
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/db && npm run build --workspace=apps/api && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
